action: Deploy CWPP agent to 12 unprotected pods in production namespace. Restrict 3 Lambda functions from AdministratorAccess to least-privilege policies.
rationale: 12 production pods (28% of fleet) have no runtime protection. 3 Lambda functions carry AdministratorAccess — any function compromise gives full AWS account access.
key_findings: CWPP coverage: 72% — 12 unprotected pods in production namespace
3 Lambda functions with AdministratorAccess execution roles
2 pods running as root with hostPath mounts
No anomalous runtime behavior detected in protected workloads (past 30d)
remediation_steps: Deploy CWPP agent to 12 unprotected pods — prioritize payment-processor
Replace AdministratorAccess on 3 Lambda roles with least-privilege policies
Migrate 2 root-running pods to non-root user context
Remove hostPath mounts from pods not requiring host filesystem access
